features: PERFECT REPLACEMENT FOR OLD OR BROKEN REMOTE CONTROLS - The Essence TV is the ideal replacement TV remote control. It reliably controls all types of TVs.
EASY TO SET UP - In just 3 steps in less than a minute. A comprehensive short installation guide is included in the product packaging.
LEARNING FUNCTION - In addition to easy setup, the remote control can be personalized easily and quickly via the learning function - by simply copying functions from the original remote control.
100% COMPATIBLE - Guaranteed to work with all manufacturer brands (TV, LED, PLASMA, OLED, QLED)

CUSTOMER SERVICE For detailed support information, visit the One For All website. Get help setting up your One For All products by downloading manuals, reviewing frequently asked questions, or watching videos. We are happy to help you
description: From the manufacturer The ideal TV replacement remote for all types of Televisions The One For All Contour TV is the ideal replacement for your TV remote without giving in when it comes to ease of use, functions and features, and compatibility! This handy Universal remote gives you easy control of your Television as on your original remote! Contour TV Universal remote control, assured to work all TV brands... Control all types of Televisions The One For All Contour TV works with all brands of Televisions (LED, LCD, Plasma). Learning feature Use the learning feature to fully customise this remote with ease, by copying functions directly from your original remote. The One For All Essence 4 gives you easy control of your devices and all the functions as on your original remote! Easy setup Follow 3 simple steps to setup your remote in literally less than a minute. Contour TV Contour 4-Way Contour 8-Way Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 22,188 4.2 out of 5 stars 3,739 4.2 out of 5 stars 3,739 Price £10.99 £ 10 . 99 — no data — no data Model number URC1210 URC1240 URC1280 Number of devices 1 4 8 Setup with app X X X Setup via SimpleSet (quick setup for main brands) ✓ ✓ ✓ Learning ✓ ✓ ✓ Batteries 2 x AAA 2 x AAA 2 x AAA Discover One For All One For All is the world leader in remote controls and the specialist in universal video audio accessories. We develop products that let you make the most of your television viewing experience. We deliver meaningful innovations that are truly universal. Our remote control database supports over 350,000 device models of over 7,000 brands. One For All universal remotes are therefore compatible and assured to work all brands.
